greeting: Happy Friday, Jean. Seven meetings today — from your TRACE touchpoint with Yuri at 9:30 AM through your 1:1 with Maria at 3:30 PM. The firm's civil suit communication went out overnight and the team is processing it. Venn rollout is live, the CoE announcement is queued. Jorge flagged a Frank C intake request that Yuri confirmed is covered. Three urgent carryovers to close before the weekend: Co-Counsel time slot, Incident Response prep, and Andrea's Halo escalation. Let's make it count.

items.label: Co-Counsel scoping call — confirm final time slot with Katie/Jill
items.detail: Jean rescheduled to Monday 11:30 AM EST, but Katie Faust confirmed Jill is not available then. Jill can do Monday 11–11:30 AM or 12–1 PM. Invite list conflict between Jon Stelzner ('keep it to Hassan and Jill') and Sara Watson ('schedule with Jill, Hassan, Chelsea, Matt, Anthony, and Cristian') still needs resolution.

items.detail: Larry Marioth's agenda covers top 5 incidents, IRG template, role definitions, and survey communication. Carried since May 15. Today's BCP/IR meeting is the window to engage.
